global_description: A flat, diamond-shaped marine creature with a smooth, leathery texture. Its body is typically gray or brown, with a long, whip-like tail. The pectoral fins are large and wing-like, extending from the sides of the body, and the eyes are positioned on the top of the head.

part_details.body: Flat, diamond-shaped with smooth, leathery skin, usually gray or brown.
part_details.tail: Long, whip-like, extending from the rear of the body.
part_details.pectoral fins: Large, wing-like, extending from the sides of the body.
part_details.eyes: Positioned on the top of the head, small and round.

spatial_relations: Pectoral fins extend from sides of body
Tail extends from rear of body
Eyes positioned on top of head
